creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
The security patch for CVE-2015-5203 in PR 202697 was not applied.
It have not received an approval for it.

feld suggested the merge, but he is not listed as a member
of portmgr or ports-secteam.

neither is his approoval accepted by SVN.

Sending        2015Q3
Sending        2015Q3/graphics/graphviz/Makefile
Adding         2015Q3/graphics/graphviz/files/patch-cmd-tools-gmlscan.l
Adding         2015Q3/graphics/graphviz/files/patch-lib-cgraph-scan.l
Transmitting file data .svn: E165001: Commit failed (details follow):
svn: E165001: Commit blocked by pre-commit hook (exit code 1) with output:
**** You need "Approved by: (portmgr|ports-secteam)" line in your log entry.


over to ports release team.
